title: Health Economics & Outcomes Research
description: The HEOR module supports cost-effectiveness analysis, budget impact modeling, and outcomes-based value contracting. Define economic analyses with scenario modeling, create value-based contracts with tiered rebate structures, and integrate findings with OMOP CDM clinical data.
tips: The Economic Analyses tab lets you create cost-effectiveness and budget impact analyses with configurable time horizons, currencies, and multiple scenarios.
Each analysis can contain multiple scenarios to compare different treatment strategies or cost assumptions side by side.
The Value Contracts tab manages outcomes-based contracts with pharmaceutical partners, including tiered rebate structures linked to clinical outcome rates.
HEOR analyses are scoped to specific data sources and can leverage existing cohort definitions for target populations.
Use the stats bar to track total analyses, completed analyses, and active value contracts at a glance.
For care gap identification and population health management, use the separate Care Bundles module.
